name: The Dream
overview: The story revolves around a hard-working woman who stands by her husband and struggles with him in life, shedding light on the Asmarat neighborhood and the state's efforts to save the lives of slum dwellers and move them to the new neighborhood.

trailers.title: مسلسل الحلم - عماد لما طلع من السجن وهرب من البلطجية إكتشف إن أمه سابت البيت واخته طردته
